prompt: From the locked clean worktree, diagnose and repair the seeded failure using the named target feedback surfaces, then run the target's acceptance proof.
applicability: Applicable when at least one target-owned feedback surface is available and owner-authorized; unavailable surfaces are recorded, not invented.
acceptance_tests: The transcript shows use of applicable tests/compiler, CI/build, review, rendered docs/links, runtime/UI/observability, deployment, or recovery feedback.
The named target acceptance passes from a clean starting revision.
No candidate functional regression is introduced.
mandatory_failures: The evaluator supplies hidden evidence without an intervention event.
The agent does not use a target feedback surface.
evidence_requirements: Feedback commands or captured target-owned feedback with timestamps.
Final acceptance output and intervention log.
